sql_array: CREATE TABLE employees (id INT, name CLOB, department CLOB);
INSERT INTO employees (id, name, department) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 'HR');
INSERT INTO employees (id, name, department) VALUES (2, 'Bob', 'Finance');
INSERT INTO employees (id, name, department) VALUES (3, 'Charlie', 'HR');
SELECT sys.group_concat(name) FROM employees WHERE department = 'HR';
